Assignments.sqlite:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "collection://2abc25ce-2747-41a5-b0dd-aa3b5c9d7ea1" (
	url TEXT UNIQUE,
	createdTime TEXT,
	"Priority" TEXT, -- one of ["🔥 High", "⚡ Medium", "🧊 Low"]
	"Source" TEXT, -- one of ["ManageBac", "TickTick", "Manual"]
	"Subject" TEXT, -- one of ["CS HL", "Math AA HL", "English B HL", "Business SL", "Modern Greek SL", "Global Politics SL", "TOK", "Other"]
	"date:Due:start" TEXT,
	"date:Due:end" TEXT,
	"date:Due:is_datetime" INTEGER,
	"Notes" TEXT,
	"Status" TEXT, -- one of ["To Do", "In Progress", "Done", "Overdue"]
	"Type" TEXT, -- one of ["Homework", "IA", "Assessment", "Exam Prep", "Project", "Revision"]
	"ManageBac ID" TEXT,
	"Task" TEXT
)

CAS Activities.sqlite:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "collection://49744652-2289-44ba-b2d7-de9a25f2f3c7" (
	url TEXT UNIQUE,
	createdTime TEXT,
	"Strand" TEXT, -- JSON array with zero or more of ["Creativity", "Activity", "Service"]
	"Evidence" TEXT,
	"Status" TEXT, -- one of ["Planned", "Ongoing", "Completed"]
	"Description" TEXT,
	"Logged" TEXT,
	"date:Date:start" TEXT,
	"date:Date:end" TEXT,
	"date:Date:is_datetime" INTEGER,
	"Hours" FLOAT,
	"Experience" TEXT
)

Side Quests.sqlite:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "collection://6f1def5a-d41e-41a2-8928-9d2068356163" (
	url TEXT UNIQUE,
	createdTime TEXT,
	"Notes" TEXT,
	"Business Venture" TEXT, -- JSON array with zero or more of ["Akademix", "ASKUS", "ClearFeed", "SBB", "Kizuna", "MindRESET", "Not Business"]
	"Outcome" TEXT,
	"Category" TEXT, -- JSON array with zero or more of ["Competition", "CAS", "CS Project", "MUN", "Academic", "Other"]
	"Link" TEXT,
	"Status" TEXT, -- one of ["Idea", "Planning", "In Progress", "Completed", "Abandoned"]
	"Name" TEXT
)

EE Progress Tracker.sqlite:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "collection://4257d220-dd56-4a13-850e-a5a7e4a5d2e4" (
	url TEXT UNIQUE,
	createdTime TEXT,
	"Source URL" TEXT,
	"Supervisor Notes" TEXT,
	"date:Due:start" TEXT,
	"date:Due:end" TEXT,
	"date:Due:is_datetime" INTEGER,
	"Status" TEXT, -- one of ["Not Started", "In Progress", "Review", "Complete"]
	"Type" TEXT, -- one of ["Research", "Outline", "First Draft", "Revision", "Final Draft"]
	"Component" TEXT
)

Modern Greek Portfolio.sqlite:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "collection://d1c85d93-9eec-45d6-913a-7accb1fbe4a4" (
	url TEXT UNIQUE,
	createdTime TEXT,
	"Text / Work / Novel" TEXT,
	"Concepts" TEXT,
	"Logged" TEXT,
	"Fields of Inquiry for Global Issues" TEXT,
	"Reading Log" TEXT,
	"Skills" TEXT,
	"Status" TEXT, -- one of ["Not Started", "In Progress", "Done"]
	"Assessment" TEXT,
	"Areas of exploration" TEXT,
	"Title" TEXT
)

Backlog Items.sqlite:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "collection://be9f228b-d3ff-43fd-a357-fef2424d8914" (
	url TEXT UNIQUE,
	createdTime TEXT,
	"Category" TEXT, -- one of ["Project Idea", "Thing to Learn", "Resource", "Course", "Book", "Tool", "Homework"]
	"Priority" TEXT, -- one of ["🔴 High", "🟡 Medium", "🟢 Low"]
	"Notes" TEXT,
	"Added" TEXT NOT NULL,
	"Status" TEXT, -- one of ["Inbox", "Up Next", "Doing", "Done", "Archived"]
	"Name" TEXT
)

Coding Projects.sqlite:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "collection://4793ae4a-5050-459a-9b97-114f0656d15a" (
	url TEXT UNIQUE,
	createdTime TEXT,
	"Status" TEXT, -- one of ["Idea", "In Progress", "Paused", "Shipped", "Archived"]
	"Stack" TEXT, -- JSON array with zero or more of ["Python", "JavaScript", "HTML/CSS", "TypeScript", "Swift", "React", "Node.js", "Flask", "Other"]
	"date:Last Pushed:start" TEXT,
	"date:Last Pushed:end" TEXT,
	"date:Last Pushed:is_datetime" INTEGER,
	"GitHub Repo ID" FLOAT,
	"Description" TEXT,
	"date:Started:start" TEXT,
	"date:Started:end" TEXT,
	"date:Started:is_datetime" INTEGER,
	"Repo URL" TEXT,
	"Category" TEXT, -- one of ["IB IA", "Side Project", "Competition", "Learning", "Tool/Automation", "Web App"]
	"Last Updated" TEXT NOT NULL,
	"Project" TEXT
)

Daily Notes.sqlite:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "collection://115f3588-3aaa-4cf0-baf8-0fa01f009dda" (
	url TEXT UNIQUE,
	createdTime TEXT,
	"Created" TEXT NOT NULL,
	"Tags" TEXT, -- JSON array with zero or more of ["School", "Personal", "Project", "Reflection", "Idea", "Win", "Blocker"]
	"Mood" TEXT, -- one of ["Great", "Good", "Okay", "Bad"]
	"Highlights" TEXT,
	"Date" TEXT
)

Claude Memory.sqlite:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "collection://7e16b69e-0671-4af6-b4d2-14486534f6da" (
	url TEXT UNIQUE,
	createdTime TEXT,
	"Category" TEXT, -- one of ["Preference", "Fact", "Decision", "Context", "Goal", "Person", "Workflow", "Correction"]
	"Domain" TEXT, -- JSON array with zero or more of ["IB", "Personal", "Coding", "School", "Career", "Projects"]
	"Created" TEXT NOT NULL,
	"Active" TEXT,
	"Source" TEXT,
	"Memory" TEXT
)
